description: Define matching achievements in Steamworks Partner (Edit Steamworks Settings > Achievements). API names must match steamApiName.

achievements.title: Centurion
achievements.desc: Clear all 100 waves.

achievements.title: Getting Started
achievements.desc: Reach wave 10 in a run.

achievements.title: Quarter Stack
achievements.desc: Reach wave 25 in a run.

achievements.title: Halfway There
achievements.desc: Reach wave 50 in a run.

achievements.title: Deep Run
achievements.desc: Reach wave 75 in a run.

achievements.title: Final Approach
achievements.desc: Reach wave 90 in a run.

achievements.title: Casual Victor
achievements.desc: Win on Casual difficulty.

achievements.title: Iron Stack
achievements.desc: Win on Brutal difficulty.

achievements.title: Barely Standing
achievements.desc: Win with base HP under 25%.

achievements.title: Bunker Supreme
achievements.desc: Win with base HP at 100%.

achievements.title: Glass Cannon
achievements.desc: Win on Brutal without fortifying the base.

achievements.title: Elite Slayer
achievements.desc: Clear a boss wave (every 10 waves).

achievements.title: First Blood
achievements.desc: Destroy your first enemy in a run.

achievements.title: Pest Control
achievements.desc: Score 100+ kills in one run.

achievements.title: Exterminator
achievements.desc: Score 500+ kills in one run.

achievements.title: Annihilator
achievements.desc: Score 1,500+ kills in one run.

achievements.title: Extinction Event
achievements.desc: Score 2,500+ kills in one run.

achievements.title: Elite Hunter
achievements.desc: Kill 15 elite enemies in one run.

achievements.title: Boss Slayer
achievements.desc: Clear 5 boss waves in one run.

achievements.title: Wave Massacre
achievements.desc: Get 30+ kills in a single wave.

achievements.title: Double Stack
achievements.desc: Clear 2 lines at once.

achievements.title: Triple Stack
achievements.desc: Clear 3 lines at once.

achievements.title: Quad Clear!
achievements.desc: Clear 4 lines at once.

achievements.title: Row Worker
achievements.desc: Clear 10+ lines total in one run.

achievements.title: Demolition Crew
achievements.desc: Clear 50+ lines total in one run.

achievements.title: Chain Reaction
achievements.desc: Trigger 5 separate line clears in one run.

achievements.title: Back-to-Back
achievements.desc: Clear 4 lines at once twice in one run.

achievements.title: Deck Doctor
achievements.desc: Complete a shop card swap.

achievements.title: Shopaholic

achievements.title: Reinforced
achievements.desc: Fortify base once in a run.

achievements.title: Bunker Mindset
achievements.desc: Fortify base 3 times in one run.

achievements.title: Citadel Builder
achievements.desc: Fortify base 5 times in one run.

achievements.title: War Chest
achievements.desc: Earn 10,000+ points in one run.

achievements.title: Wall Street
achievements.desc: Earn 800+ passive wall income in one run.

achievements.title: Chaos Shuffle
achievements.desc: Trigger a random-mode deck reshuffle.

achievements.title: Hold the Line
achievements.desc: Use hold for the first time in a run.

achievements.title: Swap Meet
achievements.desc: Use hold 10 times in one run.

achievements.title: Field Medic
achievements.desc: Repair blocks 5 times in one run.

achievements.title: Synergy Spark

achievements.title: Architect
